creator: vlad@vlad.uz.ua
text:
2011/9/7 Jase Thew <freebsd@beardz.net>:
> Hi,
>
> Please find attached a patch to update sysutils/duplicity to 0.6.15.
>
> This patch has been tinder-smoked successfully.
>
> Regards,
>
> Jase Thew.
>

Please take duplicity update on hold.
Some show stopper bugs fixed in launchpad (for example
https://code.launchpad.net/~ed.so/duplicity/reuse-passphrase-for-signing-fi=
x/+merge/72541),
so we can wait for 0.6.16


--=20
=A0=A0 Regards, Vlad
=A0_____________________________________

=A0=A0 Vlad V. Teterya
